initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_country,
    ca_state,
    ca_county,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS avg_cs_quantity,
    AVG(cs_list_price) AS avg_cs_list_price,
    AVG(cs_coupon_amt) AS avg_cs_coupon_amt,
    AVG(cs_sales_price) AS avg_cs_sales_price,
    AVG(cs_net_profit) AS avg_cs_net_profit,
    AVG(c_birth_year) AS avg_c_birth_year,
    AVG(cd_dep_count) AS avg_cd_dep_count
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    cd1.cd_gender = 'F'
    AND cd1.cd_education_status = 'Unknown'
    AND customer.c_birth_month IN (1, 6, 8, 9, 12, 2)
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('MS', 'IN', 'ND', 'OK', 'NM', 'VA')
GROUP BY ROLLUP (i_item_id, ca_country, ca_state, ca_county)
ORDER BY 
    ca_country ASC,
    ca_state ASC,
    ca_county ASC,
    i_item_id ASC
LIMIT 100;
